positive: An abstract, stylized depiction of a howling wolf's head surrounded by cosmic dust and minimalist celestial elements. The wolf silhouette should be sharp, elegant, and highly contrasted against a dark, deep indigo background. Incorporate abstract geometric patterns and glowing constellations (nebulae) in vibrant sapphire blue, electric cyan, and gold accents. The composition should be symmetrical and centered, suitable for chest placement on a t-shirt. High contrast digital illustration, vector art aesthetic, clean linework, ethereal glowing effects, dramatic studio lighting, maximalism meets minimalism.
